## Page or Section

Link or path:

## Problem

- [ ] stale command
- [ ] missing setup step
- [ ] unclear explanation
- [ ] public API mismatch
- [ ] overclaim or missing non-claim
- [ ] typo / formatting

## Current Text

Paste the relevant excerpt if small.

## Suggested Fix

What should the docs say instead?

## Verification

If this involves a command, paste the command you ran and whether it passed.
